title: heuchera americana var. calycosa
intro: Heuchera americana var. calycosa, also known as Alumroot or Bear's Foot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the saxifrage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Heuchera americana var. calycosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations include a decoction made from the roots, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
